_meta.title: Nigeria EVD Point-of-Entry Risk Dataset
_meta.methodology: Transparent 0-100 composite risk score. See scoring_weights for breakdown.
data_sources: NCDC Nigeria Port Health Services Reports
assumptions_v1: Surveillance readiness defaults to 0.45 (moderate gap) where no NCDC data available
Weather modifier defaults to 0.0 (neutral) pending seasonal layer integration
Insecurity modifier sourced from ACLED Nigeria 2025-2026 conflict density proxy
All scores are indicative — not operational — until validated by NCDC field teams
Corridor pressure is estimated from Phantom POE regional flow density, not live crossings

properties.name: Murtala Muhammed International Airport

outbreak_proximity.note: Active EVD clusters in DRC; no current West Africa outbreak. Regional pressure moderate via Congo Basin corridor.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: High international flight volume. Direct routes from DRC, Guinea, Sierra Leone, Uganda.

poe_exposure_class.note: Highest passenger throughput POE in Nigeria. ~15M pax/year. Airport class: TIER-1.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: NCDC port health present. Thermal scanning confirmed 2024. Gap: inconsistent EVD-specific triage protocols.

modifiers.note: High urban density Lagos. Healthcare surge capacity limited. No active conflict modifier.

properties.drivers_summary: High passenger volume + active DRC corridor pressure + limited EVD triage protocol standardization
properties.recommended_action: Validate EVD triage SOP compliance. Confirm isolation room readiness. Flag DRC direct flight passengers for enhanced screening.

properties.name: Nnamdi Azikiwe International Airport

outbreak_proximity.note: DRC corridor indirect. No proximal EVD event.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Government/diplomatic hub. Lower tourist volume than LOS. Fewer endemic zone direct routes.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: NCDC FCT coordination present. Port health services rated moderate by 2024 JEE Nigeria.

modifiers.note: Capital city amplifier: if importation occurs, national response impact high.

properties.drivers_summary: Capital city amplification risk + indirect DRC corridor exposure
properties.recommended_action: Ensure EVD protocol refresh for port health staff. Capital city outbreak consequence warrants precautionary investment.

properties.name: Mallam Aminu Kano International Airport

outbreak_proximity.note: Geographically distant from active EVD zones. Sahel corridor — Sudan/Chad flux but low EVD pressure.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Hajj hub — seasonal mass movement to/from West Africa. High volume bursts.

poe_exposure_class.note: TIER-2. Significant hajj season surge volume.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Moderate readiness. Hajj health teams established but EVD-specific protocols not verified.

modifiers.note: Seasonal mass movement risk modifier elevated during hajj period (May–Jul).

properties.drivers_summary: Hajj mass movement seasonal risk spike + Sahel corridor access
properties.recommended_action: Seasonal EVD protocol activation during Hajj period. Coordinate with Saudi Arabia arrivals health screening.

properties.name: Apapa Port

outbreak_proximity.note: Coastal West Africa maritime corridor. Guinea/Sierra Leone shipping lanes.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Highest cargo volume port in Nigeria. Crew movement from endemic regions.

poe_exposure_class.note: TIER-1 seaport. Crew/passenger movement lower than airport but non-trivial.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Port health present but maritime EVD protocols less standardized than airports.

modifiers.note: Crew shore leave creates diffuse urban exposure risk in Lagos metro.

properties.drivers_summary: Maritime crew movement from Guinea/SL corridor + diffuse Lagos urban exposure on shore leave
properties.recommended_action: Enforce maritime health declaration for vessels from endemic zones. Shore leave health screening for crew from West African ports.

properties.name: Tin Can Island Port

outbreak_proximity.note: Same corridor as Apapa. Lower international vessel frequency.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Second Lagos port. Lower crew volume than Apapa.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Port health assumed present. Readiness unverified at EVD level.

modifiers.note: Proximity to Apapa creates shared urban exposure envelope.

properties.drivers_summary: Secondary Lagos maritime exposure, shared corridor with Apapa
properties.recommended_action: Coordinate screening protocols with Apapa. Avoid duplication gaps between the two Lagos port health units.

properties.name: Onne Oil and Gas Free Zone Port

outbreak_proximity.note: Niger Delta corridor. CAR/DRC movement via interior routes converges near Rivers State.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Oil industry international workforce. Frequent rotation from multiple countries including EVD-risk zones.

poe_exposure_class.note: Industrial/cargo port. International oil company workforce creates non-standard exposure pathway.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Industrial zone health infrastructure present but geared to occupational health not infectious disease.

modifiers.note: Oil worker accommodation clusters create potential amplification environment.

properties.drivers_summary: International oil sector workforce rotation from EVD-risk zones + non-standard POE exposure pathway
properties.recommended_action: Engage NOGIC JV health officers. Establish EVD declaration requirement for international rotators. Screen on entry from known endemic zones.

properties.name: Calabar Port

outbreak_proximity.note: Closest Nigerian port to Cameroon border corridor. Cameroon has reported periodic EVD spillover risk from DRC.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Active cross-border trade with Cameroon. Mfum/Ekok land border feeding into same catchment.

poe_exposure_class.note: TIER-2 seaport with cross-border overland feeder routes.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Cross River State has previous EVD preparedness gaps per 2024 NCDC assessments.

modifiers.note: Informal cross-border movement from Cameroon not fully captured at port.

properties.drivers_summary: Cameroon corridor proximity + informal movement + Cross River EVD readiness gap
properties.recommended_action: Prioritize EVD readiness assessment for Cross River port health. Coordinate with Mfum/Ekok land crossing. Activate Cameroon alert threshold.

properties.name: Seme Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Benin Republic border. West Africa corridor. Historical EVD importation risk via Togo/Benin route.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: One of Nigeria's busiest land borders. High informal trader/traveller volume. Difficult to fully screen.

poe_exposure_class.note: High-volume land crossing. Multiple informal crossing points along this corridor.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Land border health post capacity limited. High throughput overwhelms screening infrastructure.

modifiers.note: Informal bypass routes documented. Effective coverage below 60% estimated.

properties.drivers_summary: Highest volume SW land crossing + West Africa corridor + informal bypass routes + overwhelmed health post capacity
properties.recommended_action: Reinforce health post staffing. Implement risk-based rather than universal screening. Flag travellers from Togo/Benin for EVD awareness.

properties.name: Idiroko Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Benin corridor. Parallel route to Seme.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: High market trade crossing. Significant informal economy movement.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Limited health post infrastructure per field reports.

modifiers.note: Acts as overflow route when Seme congested.

properties.drivers_summary: Parallel West Africa corridor + market trade overflow from Seme + limited health post
properties.recommended_action: Joint screening protocol with Seme. Deploy mobile health teams during peak market days.

properties.name: Jibiya / Magama Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Niger Republic border. Low direct EVD pressure but Sahel transit corridor.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Significant Sahel trade route. Movement of pastoralists and traders across season.

poe_exposure_class.note: Active land crossing but not among highest volume.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: North West health post infrastructure strained.

modifiers.note: Insecurity modifier: Katsina banditry risk affects health worker deployment continuity.

properties.drivers_summary: Sahel corridor transit + health infrastructure strain + insecurity continuity risk
properties.recommended_action: Ensure health post continuity plan during security incidents. Seasonal pastoralist screening protocols.

properties.name: Illela Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Niger corridor. Low direct EVD risk.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Trans-Sahara trade route feeder. Moderate throughput.

modifiers.note: Remote location limits rapid response capacity.

properties.drivers_summary: Trans-Sahara feeder route + remote location response lag
properties.recommended_action: Establish mobile response protocol for remote crossing. Periodic readiness assessment.

properties.name: Maigatari Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Niger corridor. Indirect Chad basin exposure.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Significant cross-border trade. Livestock and goods.

poe_exposure_class.note: Active crossing with informal parallel routes.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Jigawa State health post capacity limited.

modifiers.note: Proximity to Lake Chad basin — cholera/meningitis co-risk context.

properties.drivers_summary: Niger-Chad corridor exposure + informal routes + limited health post capacity
properties.recommended_action: Integrated surveillance approach covering EVD, cholera and meningitis at this crossing.

properties.name: Banki Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Cameroon border in Borno. Far North Cameroon has had EVD spillover watch events. DRC corridor accessible via CAR-Cameroon route.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Massive displacement movement due to Lake Chad Basin crisis. Estimated 2M+ IDP movements in this corridor. Screening coverage critically low.

poe_exposure_class.note: Humanitarian corridor. Formal POE classification but effectively a mass displacement transit zone.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: CRITICAL: Active conflict zone. Health post operations intermittent. IDP camp density creates amplification risk if importation occurs.

modifiers.note: Conflict modifier: MAXIMUM. Lake Chad Basin insecurity severely limits screening continuity.

properties.drivers_summary: CRITICAL: Mass IDP movement + Cameroon DRC spillover corridor + active conflict = near-zero effective screening capacity
properties.recommended_action: PRIORITY: Establish emergency mobile EVD screening at IDP transit points. INGO health partners (MSF, IRC) coordination essential. Cannot rely on static health post.

properties.name: Mfum / Ekok Border Crossing

outbreak_proximity.note: Direct Cameroon corridor. South West Cameroon has had EVD proximity events. DRC-CAR-Cameroon spillover route ends here.

corridor_movement_pressure.note: Active trade and informal movement. Cameroon Anglophone crisis has created displacement feeding this route.

poe_exposure_class.note: Land crossing with informal parallel routes in forested terrain — difficult to monitor.

surveillance_readiness_gap.note: Cross River State: health post understaffed. Forested border = informal bypasses common.

modifiers.note: Anglophone Cameroon crisis displacement modifier. Forest terrain reduces effective monitoring.

properties.drivers_summary: HIGH: DRC spillover corridor via Cameroon + Anglophone crisis displacement + forest terrain bypass risk + understaffed health post
properties.recommended_action: PRIORITY: Surge health post staffing. Deploy forest corridor mobile teams. Cameroon MINSANTE coordination on EVD alert threshold.
